description: You are setting up an animation shot using a referenced master rig. A target object (yellow sphere) is already in the scene. Link the 'RoboArm_Collection' from the master asset file at '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/assets/master_rig.blend' and create a library override to enable animation. Pose the arm so it reaches towards the yellow sphere and insert a rotation keyframe for the bones at Frame 1. Save the resulting file to '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/shot_01_animated.blend'.
